name: industrial-safety-governance
description: Design safety boundaries, governance, approval, fallback, and audit strategy for an industrial agent system.

agents.name: automation-governance-architect
agents.role: Define governance boundaries, autonomy levels, and approval paths.

agents.name: workflow-architect
agents.role: Map the proposal, validation, approval, execution, rollback, and audit workflow.

agents.name: compliance-auditor
agents.role: Review policies, audit requirements, and high-risk control gates.

agents.name: security-engineer
agents.role: Assess permissions, tool whitelist boundaries, credential handling, and escalation risks.

agents.name: evidence-collector
agents.role: Collect assumptions, required evidence, open questions, and traceability gaps.
